# Regex fixtures for skill: incident-trend-analyzer
# Format: one directive per non-empty, non-comment line.
#   MATCH: <prompt>     — regex from config/default-triggers.json for this skill must match
#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — regex must NOT match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# NO_MATCH line is verbatim-borrowed from outcome-review MATCH fixture.

MATCH: analyze postmortems from the last quarter and surface the failure patterns
MATCH: what keeps breaking in the payment service over the past month
MATCH: show me incident trends and recurring incidents for this sprint

NO_MATCH: how did the experiment perform last week
